What We Do

Every service built for
platform-native growth

No generic social media playbooks. Everything we do is engineered for how Reddit and X actually work.

Reddit + X
Full-Funnel Community Growth
We build your brand across both platforms simultaneously — driving Reddit thread visibility while growing your X audience. Most agencies pick one. We specialize in the synergy between both ecosystems.
Cross-platform strategyAudience mappingContent calendarMonthly reporting
Reddit
Reddit Community Management
Authentic engagement in subreddits where your buyers live. We find the right communities, create content that doesn't get downvoted, and build genuine brand trust.
Subreddit researchAMA coordinationComment seeding
X / Twitter
X Account Growth & Monetization
We grow your X following with real people in your niche. Ghost-writing, reply strategy, thread creation, and monetization setup — from 0 to revenue.
Thread writingGhost-writingReply strategy
Reddit
Reddit Ads Management
Reddit's ad platform is underpriced and underutilized. We run targeted campaigns against subreddits with surgical precision — lower CPCs, higher intent.
Campaign setupSubreddit targetingA/B testing
Our Process

From audit to audience
in four steps

1
Deep Audit
We analyze where your audience hangs out — which subreddits, which X accounts, what they talk about.
2
Strategy Build
Custom content and engagement plan tailored to your brand voice and growth goals.
3
Execute
Our team posts, replies, and engages daily — natively, not robotically. No bots, no spam.
4
Report & Iterate
Weekly metrics, monthly deep dives. We double down on what's working, cut what isn't.
Platform Expertise

Two platforms.
One agency that gets both.

r/

Reddit Marketing

Reddit users are the most skeptical buyers on the internet — and the most loyal once you earn their trust. We know how to market here without getting torched.

  • Subreddit targeting & community infiltration
  • Native post creation that earns upvotes
  • AMA (Ask Me Anything) campaign management
  • Reddit Ads with interest & subreddit targeting
  • Reputation and crisis management on Reddit
𝕏

X (Twitter) Marketing

X is the fastest platform for building a personal or brand audience from scratch. We write the threads, handle the replies, and grow the numbers.

  • Daily posting & thread creation
  • Ghost-writing for founders and executives
  • Follower growth via reply and engagement loops
  • X monetization setup (subscriptions, tips)
  • Influencer collaborations and reposts
Results

Numbers that moved
the needle

340%
Traffic increase
SaaS startup saw 340% more website traffic in 60 days after we launched their Reddit community strategy.
18K
New followers in 90 days
X account for a fintech founder grew from 800 to 18K followers using our thread + reply growth system.
$0.38
CPC on Reddit Ads
E-commerce brand achieved $0.38 CPC on Reddit — 6× cheaper than their Google Ads cost-per-click.
2.1M
Organic impressions
A single Reddit AMA we coordinated drove 2.1M impressions and 4,000 product signups in 24 hours.
72hrs
To first viral post
Our fastest onboarding to first viral piece of content — a Reddit thread that hit the front page of r/entrepreneur.
$220K
Revenue attributed
D2C brand tracked $220,000 in direct revenue from RedSheel's Reddit + X campaigns over one quarter.
